step_rationale: Apoptosis-autophagy dysregulation drives plaque inflammation and cardiomyocyte injury.
mechanism: Circulating lncRNA regulating apoptosis and autophagy pathways implicated in atherosclerotic plaque destabilization and myocardial injury.

references.title: Dysregulated Circulating Apoptosis- and Autophagy-Related lncRNAs as Diagnostic Markers in Coronary Artery Disease.
